caption: A presentation screen displays a series of slides about logging challenges, with a small webcam feed of a woman in a white top visible in the upper right corner. The first frame shows a slide titled "Logging Challenges" with the word "Backpressure" below it, featuring a diagram of a sink with water filling the basins. In the next frame, the diagram changes to show water overflowing from the sink and spilling onto the floor. The subsequent frames transition to a new slide titled "Fluent Bit" with the "fluentbit" logo and the word "Backpressure" again. The sink diagram is modified; a rectangular box with the text "is more ok?" is placed over the left basin, and a dashed red line with an arrow curves from the box down toward the drain pipe, illustrating a conceptual process or solution.
